name: setFlagFOVCenterMarker
description: Shows or hides the Field of View center marker (crosshair) at the center of the screen. Useful for precise pointing and astrophotography framing.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: `true` to show the FOV center marker, `false` to hide it.

alternative: Use `core.getStelProperty('SpecialMarkersMgr.fovCenterMarkerDisplayed')` to read the current state.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

name: getFlagFOVCenterMarker
description: Returns whether the Field of View center marker (crosshair) is displayed at the center of the screen.
returnDescription: `true` if the FOV center marker is visible.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

name: setColorFOVCenterMarker
description: Sets the color of the Field of View center marker (crosshair).

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector with values between 0.0 and 1.0.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

name: getColorFOVCenterMarker
description: Returns the current color of the Field of View center marker.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

example:
var color = SpecialMarkersMgr.getColorFOVCenterMarker();
core.debug("FOV center color: RGB(" + color[0] + ", " + color[1] + ", " + color[2] + ")");

name: setFlagFOVCircularMarker
description: Shows or hides the circular Field of View marker. Useful for visualizing eyepiece fields, camera fields, or telescope FOVs.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: `true` to show the circular FOV marker, `false` to hide it.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

name: getFlagFOVCircularMarker
description: Returns whether the circular Field of View marker is displayed. This shows a circle representing a specific angular size on the sky.
returnDescription: `true` if the circular FOV marker is visible.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

name: setFOVCircularMarkerSize
description: Sets the angular size of the circular Field of View marker in degrees.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

name: getFOVCircularMarkerSize
description: Returns the angular size of the circular Field of View marker in degrees.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

example:
var size = SpecialMarkersMgr.getFOVCircularMarkerSize();
core.debug("Circular FOV marker size: " + size + "°");

name: setColorFOVCircularMarker
description: Sets the color of the circular Field of View marker.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

name: getColorFOVCircularMarker
description: Returns the current color of the circular Field of View marker.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

example:
var color = SpecialMarkersMgr.getColorFOVCircularMarker();
core.debug("Circular FOV color: RGB(" + color[0] + ", " + color[1] + ", " + color[2] + ")");

name: setFlagFOVRectangularMarker
description: Shows or hides the rectangular Field of View marker. Useful for camera framing, sensor size simulation, or rectangular eyepieces.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: `true` to show the rectangular FOV marker, `false` to hide it.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

name: getFlagFOVRectangularMarker
description: Returns whether the rectangular Field of View marker is displayed.
returnDescription: `true` if the rectangular FOV marker is visible.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

name: setFOVRectangularMarkerWidth
description: Sets the width (horizontal angular size) of the rectangular Field of View marker in degrees.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

name: getFOVRectangularMarkerWidth
description: Returns the width (horizontal angular size) of the rectangular Field of View marker in degrees.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

example:
var width = SpecialMarkersMgr.getFOVRectangularMarkerWidth();
core.debug("Rectangular FOV width: " + width + "°");

name: setFOVRectangularMarkerHeight
description: Sets the height (vertical angular size) of the rectangular Field of View marker in degrees.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

example: SpecialMarkersMgr.setFOVRectangularMarkerHeight(1.5);

name: getFOVRectangularMarkerHeight
description: Returns the height (vertical angular size) of the rectangular Field of View marker in degrees.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

example:
var height = SpecialMarkersMgr.getFOVRectangularMarkerHeight();
core.debug("Rectangular FOV height: " + height + "°");

name: setFOVRectangularMarkerRotationAngle
description: Sets the rotation angle of the rectangular Field of View marker in degrees. Rotates the rectangle clockwise.

parameters.name: angle
parameters.description: Rotation angle in degrees (0 = no rotation).

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

name: getFOVRectangularMarkerRotationAngle
description: Returns the rotation angle of the rectangular Field of View marker in degrees.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

example:
var angle = SpecialMarkersMgr.getFOVRectangularMarkerRotationAngle();
core.debug("Rectangular FOV rotation: " + angle + "°");

name: setColorFOVRectangularMarker
description: Sets the color of the rectangular Field of View marker.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

name: getColorFOVRectangularMarker
description: Returns the current color of the rectangular Field of View marker.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

example:
var color = SpecialMarkersMgr.getColorFOVRectangularMarker();
core.debug("Rectangular FOV color: RGB(" + color[0] + ", " + color[1] + ", " + color[2] + ")");

name: setFlagCompassMarks
description: Shows or hides compass marks (azimuth tick marks) around the horizon. Includes degree labels every 15 degrees.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: `true` to show compass marks, `false` to hide them.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

name: getFlagCompassMarks
description: Returns whether compass marks (azimuth tick marks around the horizon) are displayed.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

name: setColorCompassMarks
description: Sets the color of the compass marks.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

name: getColorCompassMarks
description: Returns the current color of the compass marks.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

example:
var color = SpecialMarkersMgr.getColorCompassMarks();
core.debug("Compass marks color: RGB(" + color[0] + ", " + color[1] + ", " + color[2] + ")");
